title: helm-publish block metadata
description: Artifact emitted by the helm-publish building block after publishing a Helm chart to an OCI registry.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the block completed.

chart_name.description: Name of the published Helm chart.

chart_version.description: Published chart version (semver, without v prefix).

chart_ref.description: Full OCI reference to the published chart (e.g. oci://ghcr.io/owner/chart-name:1.2.3).

registry.description: OCI registry the chart was published to (e.g. ghcr.io).
